judgment.summary: Strong growth and margins are tempered by high debt and negative free cash flow.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 5.7%; next earnings date is 2026-06-10.
positives: Revenue growth 21.7% YoY and earnings growth 24.5% YoY indicate strong top-line and bottom-line expansion.
Profit margin 25.3% and return on equity 57.6% demonstrate robust profitability and efficient use of shareholder capital.
Forward P/E 23.42x is attractive relative to trailing P/E of 33.78x, suggesting expected earnings growth.
Analyst consensus is a strong buy with a mean target price significantly above the current stock price.
negatives: Debt/Equity ratio of 415.26 is extremely high, indicating significant leverage.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $-22.30B is a major concern, suggesting the company is burning cash.
Beta of 1.54 indicates higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: Wedbush maintained its bullish stance on Oracle, citing investor oversight of the company's demand visibility. This comes ahead of Oracle's next earnings report, where analysts are projecting solid growth. Traders should consider the analyst sentiment and the upcoming earnings catalyst when evaluating options positions.

headlines.title: Wedbush Remains Bullish On Oracle (ORCL), Says Investors Are Overlooking Demand Visibility
